components.name: HorizontalGroupedVirtualListComponent
components.template:
ng-virtual-list

Maximum performance for extremely large lists

Works correctly in all browsers and platforms

Animation of elements is supported.

@author: Evgenii Grebennikov

djonnyx@gmail.com

v 14.X - v 21.X

Horizontal grouped virtual list

{{data.name}}
} @default {

} } }

inputsClass.name: scrollbarTheme
inputsClass.defaultValue: {        fill: ["rgba(51, 0, 97, 1)", "rgba(73, 0, 97, 1)"],        strokeGradientColor: ["rgba(133, 142, 255, 0)", "rgb(0, 133, 160)"],        strokeAnimationDuration: 1000,        thickness: 6,        roundCorner: [3, 3, 3, 3],        rippleColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)',    }
